title: Bare Bones Glare Retexture/Fix
description: Just a simple texture fix of svveetmavis' great Bare Bones styled retextures.
body:
[Bare Bones Mod Compat + Extra](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-mod-compat-+-extra) is a great resource pack; however, the [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) patch had the pre-1.19.3 mod update of the Glare texture which resulted in this...

![broken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f67aee01dc7c6beb614386901a83ddb7ed849b2.png)

So I opened up paintdotnet, did a simple edit, and fixed it.

![fixed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/085beab4d41d53732cdfd023e55f92bcf6c959ed.png)

The textures were created by [svveetmavis](https://modrinth.com/user/svveetmavis); I just edited it so full credits to them. As for the load order, just make sure it's above [Bare Bones Mod Compat + Extra](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-mod-compat-+-extra).

Q&A

Q: Why?

A: Why not
